items.description: Currently mentoring junior developers and leading live production systems for enterprise clients. Made critical architecture decisions including selection of Gazebo simulation platform over alternatives, resulting in superior system performance.

Achieved 90% database cost reduction through performance optimization (freelance project), designed company-wide financial system for major healthcare provider, and improved legacy system workflows by 60%.
Direct client communication and requirements gathering for live production systems, including ongoing support for Cross-Border Road Transport Agency integration.

professionalSummary.title: Professional Summary
professionalSummary.content: Senior full-stack software developer with 8 years of experience leading technical projects and delivering enterprise solutions across digital security, fintech, and document verification sectors. Proven expertise in technical leadership, stakeholder management, and architecting scalable systems. Track record of making critical technology decisions, mentoring development teams, and delivering measurable business impact including significant cost optimizations and company-wide system deployments. Strong advocate for modern development practices and emerging technologies.

experience.title: Senior Full-Stack Software Developer & Technical Lead
experience.description: Leading technical development and client relationships for digital signature and document verification solutions. Currently mentoring junior developers and serving as technical lead on live production systems serving enterprise clients.

highlights.title: CBRTA Project Leadership
highlights.description: Leading end-to-end delivery of Cross-Border Road Transport Agency integration, including direct client stakeholder management, technical requirements gathering, and production deployment. System is currently live enabling secure digital signing for cross-border transportation permits using C#.

highlights.title: Technical Architecture Decisions
highlights.description: Researched and selected Gazebo simulation platform over PyBullet for Booyco Electronics hardware-in-the-loop automotive testing project, delivering superior real-time vehicle safety system testing capabilities. Decision resulted in more robust simulation environment and significantly reduced physical testing costs.

highlights.title: Mobile Application Development
highlights.description: Led development of Scrutineer mobile app for ISO/IEC 20248 digital signature verification, built with Angular, TypeScript, and Capacitor for cross-platform deployment.

highlights.title: API Development
highlights.description: Contributed to design and development of Template Overlay Engine API enabling dynamic PDF generation and document processing integration across multiple client applications.

highlights.title: Modern Development Advocacy
highlights.description: Championing adoption of AI-powered development tools including LLM-driven programming assistants to enhance team productivity and code quality across the organization.

experience.title: Freelance Software Developer
experience.description: Delivered high-quality custom software solutions for international clients, achieving a perfect 5.0/5.0 rating praised for quality, timeliness, and clear communication.

highlights.title: Task Management PoC Application
highlights.description: Delivered Proof-of-Concept task management application built with Vue 3, TypeScript, and Firebase (Firestore), offering clients an efficient and scalable solution for task tracking.

highlights.title: Database Optimization
highlights.description: Designed custom database optimization layer on top of Firebase Firestore, reducing database reads by 90% through intelligent local caching and selective update fetching while maintaining real-time reactivity.

highlights.title: Advanced User Experience Features
highlights.description: Developed core functionalities including reusable course and task templates for admins, automated daily task reminders via Firebase functions, and interactive user dashboards for progress tracking.

highlights.title: Modern UI Architecture
highlights.description: Created clean, modular UI using Vue 3's single file component syntax and setup scripts, ensuring easy customization and scalability for future development.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Developed enterprise-scale applications for major healthcare clients as part of cross-functional 10-person team including business analysts, developers, and QA engineers.

highlights.title: Enterprise-Scale Financial System
highlights.description: Architected and delivered company-wide budgeting system for Netcare (major healthcare provider), enabling financial aggregation at any level of granularity. System deployed across entire organization with sophisticated real-time data rendering capabilities for massive datasets.

highlights.title: System Architecture Leadership
highlights.description: Contributed to overarching application architecture design enabling rapid deployment of multiple client projects through modular, reusable components, significantly reducing development time and code duplication.

highlights.title: Process Optimization
highlights.description: Re-engineered legacy licensing system, improving workflow efficiency by 60% through UX optimization and automated validation processes, streamlining customer license creation and approval workflows.

highlights.title: Technical Problem Solving
highlights.description: Engineered complex solutions for rendering and real-time modification of massive financial datasets, delivering smooth user experience despite challenging technical constraints.

experience.title: Software Developer & Team Lead
experience.description: Led a team of 5 engineers in developing web-based solutions and establishing modern development practices.

highlights.description: Implemented company-wide Angular 2+ and Firebase technology stack
Built integration solution for Finastra International connecting NetSuite and OpenAir
Developed "Performance Hub" internal business intelligence platform
Established Git/GitHub workflows and mentored junior developers
